### Task

<!-- A clear, one-paragraph description of what needs to be done. -->

### Context

<!-- Why is this useful? Link to relevant files, docs, or related issues. -->

- **Relevant file(s):** <!-- e.g. `testcase/src/test/java/stest/tron/wallet/dailybuild/account/...` -->
- **Related docs:** <!-- Link to TRON docs, TIPs, or style guide if applicable -->

### Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] <!-- e.g. New test class created in the correct package -->
- [ ] <!-- e.g. All assertions include descriptive failure messages -->
- [ ] <!-- e.g. Test passes locally with `./gradlew stest` -->
- [ ] <!-- e.g. Follows naming conventions from STYLE_GUIDE.md -->
- [ ] CI passes (compile + checkstyle)

### Estimated Effort

<!-- Choose one: -->
- [ ] Small (< 1 hour) -- e.g. rename a class, add assertion messages
- [ ] Medium (1-3 hours) -- e.g. write a new test, add Javadoc to a utility class
